name: editor-tweaks
description: Toggle quotes, highlight current line, remove tabs on save, and prune stale recently-opened entries — small utilities in one extension.
author: euxx

editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderColor.description: Bottom border color of the current line highlight (CSS color value). Leave empty to disable.

editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderStyle.description: Bottom border style of the current line highlight.

editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderWidth.patternErrorMessage: Must be a CSS length value (e.g. '1px', '0.5em').
editorTweaks.highlightLine.borderWidth.description: Bottom border width of the current line highlight (CSS length value).

editorTweaks.toggleQuotes.chars.description: Quote characters to cycle through. Each entry must be a single character.

editorTweaks.removeTabsOnSave.enable.description: Convert tabs to spaces on file save.

editorTweaks.removeTabsOnSave.excludePat.markdownDescription:
Patterns to skip tab removal for. Each entry can be:
- A **language ID** (e.g. `makefile`) — matched against the document's language
- An **exact filename** (e.g. `GNUmakefile`) — matched against the file's basename
- A **glob** containing `*` (e.g. `*.go`, `prefix_*.txt`, `*_suffix.go`) — matched against the file's basename

Defaults to `makefile` and `*.go` since those file types require tab characters.

editorTweaks.pruneRecentlyOpened.enable.description: Enable the Prune Recently Opened feature.

editorTweaks.pruneRecentlyOpened.runAtSt.description: Automatically prune the recently-opened list each time VS Code starts.

editorTweaks.pruneRecentlyOpened.maxItem.markdownDescription: Maximum number of local (`file://`) entries to keep per category (workspaces and files are counted separately). Oldest entries are removed first. Set to `-1` for no limit.

scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check
